reviews.review_description: I'm 31, so I grew up with all the point and click adventures from the past, and let me say even not in VR this game would still be solid!!! If you buy this game and like point and clicks you will most definitely not be disappointed. I know I will for sure be keeping an eye on these developers!

Been playing for about an hour or so. Literally have been three times the game made me jump. Apprantely there are multiple endings as well. It's got that same "find clues to learn this,  or unlock that" method of play. Sort of like resident Evil. Worth the purchase.
Finished the game in hours. Difficulty not too demanding. Good entertainment for awhile.
One of the best games out there, not perfect, but a complete adventure and polished scary fun. Paid the 33%discount (€6,69) price which is more justified.

I wasn't feeling it.
: (
This is a genuine mystery with a great story and some honestly scary moments. Very creepy atmosphere and it was enjoyable solving the puzzles and working out the truth.

This game is amazing. It's easy to maneuver and not terribly difficult. I have made it to the machine, but everytime I try to flee the killer it freezes. I just can't get pass this. Its driving me nutz.
It was hard at first but kept at it & just finished the game. About to play again

Great game, worked flawlessly on Oculus Go. Must buy for fans of old-school adventure game with exploration and story focus. Excellent soundtrack and atmosphere. The puzzles are well integrated and don't feel out of place or forced. Around 2 hours to compete, but can easily take longer if trying to find every little secret and read every note. Buy as a 2-pack with the sequel and save a bit. (Nitpick- back button drops you out of the game with no warning)
It has a nice story with lots of detailed Infos.  Riddles could be a bit more challenging or complex.  A good VR game to start with.
I hope the creators of this game release another title soon. I'd be willing to pay for a similar title.
For such a short game I really enjoyed this. It's not incredible but it gives a glimpse to where vr adventure mysteries style games can go. 3d monkey island etc
Love this game i want to find anothet
This game is a must have.  Some parts are creepy and will scare the daylights out of you at some points. What I don't like is after each ending you have to start all over again.

I Love This Game.....!!!!!! BUT...... I pick the killer and get stuck in freezer!!!!!! Anybody else have this problem?????????????? 
OCULUS SUPPORT????
More games like this please! Scary but very exciting. Replay that's all l can do for now!!

There's a great game in here hampered by a few glitches. Firstly, get rid of the nauseating vomit mode, nobody wants that. Remove the scenes with the baddy guy. They're clunky and destroy the ambience. Fix the the glitches and crashes, I never got to see the end of the game as there was an impassable glitch in the final scenes. Otherwise, the general environments are entertaining. The puzzles are fun, if a bit simple and spoon fed. I was quite enjoying it. But charging money for a game that you can't finish due to bugs is not good form.
Was a great game! Glad it finally showed up in my library as purchased with my other 5 games that were free with my gear vr bundle!

You need this game. Want to support the development of high quality VR games in the future? Buy this. Dead Secret is a classic mystery thriller through and through, while managing to be one of the most immersive and well designed games on the Gear VR right now. A high quality expeience I completely recommend.

Before getting this app i was looking through the reviews (of course) as I was about to pay 10$ for this game. I was quite worried because most of the bad reviews were of it not working on oculus go( the one I own). But in the end I got it as I decided they were at least months ago and it has most likely been fixed. Well it worked PERFECTLY on my go. Just a couple minutes in and I’m already laughing at myself for my screams. Wish there were more games that were as interactive as these.
